Are you ready?
Always!
Good, let's go
(10 months ago, she swept...) Thank you
('Gordon Ramsay Burger')
(Gordon Ramsay Part 2, Pizza Today!)
(I'll eat well) I'll try the pizza first. I have to try it before it gets cold
(Star Chef's pizza)
(Credibility +100000...!!) It's so good
(He's actually there...?!!) I heard I could actually meet Gordon Ramsay here
(He's actually here...!)
('Top Of Top Chef Gordon Ramsay', Check it out in the video)
(A place where you can feel the dignity of a high-rise building)
(in the middle of the city)
Hello everyone
I came to the D Tower at Seoul Forest

(The 'Gordon Ramsay Burger' I visited about 10 months ago) I went to the Gordon Ramsay's burger place before
I really enjoyed eating those burgers
They have Gordon Ramsay Pizza now
(Hot place) It has only been 1 week since it opened
(He's there..?!) I heard that Gordon Ramsay is there
(Invited!) I got invited so I'm here
(Am I shaking...?) Will I be able to see him?
(Let's get it) I'll head inside
('Gordon Ramsay Street Pizza' Seoul Forest)
(Entered the restaurant) Hello
(That person...?!) Oh? He's...
(His arms froze because he was so surprised...) (Chef who witnessed how far K-stomach can go)
I'm hungry
(No way..)
Nice to see you again!
(Even on the spoon.. haha) Gordon Ramsay is even on the spoon

(Hi)
- Hello, nice to see you again - Hello
(A familiar face..?) At the burger place
(Return) (Weren't you at the burger place?)
(Please make it delicious)
I changed jobs
(Haha such a jokester!) You did?
No, since it's the same brand, I'm just here because this place opened
(Let's get to know Gordon Ramsay Pizza!) Here's the menu and I'll help you with it
The street pizza is bottomless for customers
(Corn & Chorizo, Pepperoni, Tandoori Halloumi) Classic Margherita and Ham Hock & Pineapple
There are 6 types of pizzas including the Daily Special Pizza
Our employees will go around
and hand you a slice on your plate
(Bottomless = Unlimited) It's unlimited?
Yes, it's unlimited

- Oh really? - We keep providing them
(Increase in happiness) I didn't know that
For our daily special,
we have different pizza for every day of the week
The blue cup is on the left
(Full refills of soda, too!) It's a cup that you can use for bottomless soda
- It's very cost-effective unlike the burger place - Yes, it's nice here haha
(Since I got invited, they will also give me sides!) We'll prepare side dishes for you
so that you can eat it all together
We'll prepare 5 sides including wings
Hello!
(Hi hi)
Let's go!!
(Come on, pizza!) We'll prepare the pizza now
(The order is in, move!!)
(Gordon Ramsay Pizza baked in the brazier)

(It's going to be incredibly delicious!!)
(You can look forward to Gordon Ramsay Pizza)
Honestly, the burger place is a bit expensive
but this place is inexpensive
(Does it have another 0..?) I was thinking it'd be $298
but it's $29.80
They said I could meet Gordon Ramsay
I'm nervous. I'm scared...!
Oh? He's there
(Pit-a-pat)
(He's finally here)
(He's here! Chef Gordon Ramsay!)
(As for him..)
(He's a world-class owner chef...)
(He's spiciness itself)
(who needs to be beeped often)

(Gordon James Ramsay, Jr.)
I brought delicious wings
- This is the Classic Margherita - Thank you
So nice to see you
(Fear of English..)
(Help me, interpreter!)
So nice to see you!
I'm so honored
When we start developing new burgers,
I'd like you to come as one of my official tasters because
you've been navigating around the whole menu for the burgers
(The mukbang that Ramsay acknowledges...)
(The burgers were so delicious! Hehe) I enjoyed them so much
so I'm looking forward to the pizza too
(Self-translating) The crust is just incredible
72-hour fermentation

I spent time in Italy, I lived
in Italy for 6 months and I perfected my craft
I'll enjoy it!
Please enjoy!
Good to see you! Thank you so much for coming
(He was sweeter than I thought) I couldn't understand what he was saying so...
I should study English
(Wings are here!) I have the wings for you
(Appetizing wing dishes) The sauce is a chocolate barbecue sauce
- Street hot sauce - Yes, it's a bit spicy
Okay, there are more sides
This is J.F.C Dirty Fries
What about this?
Street Hot Fries
(I've never seen anything like this before..)
I have to eat it as soon as it comes out, I'll quickly eat them

This is the Classic Margherita Pizza
Bon appétit
(Pause!) It's here
This is the spiciest among the wings
HOTTER THAN HELL!!
We have this for you
And this is the mildest one, Sweet Chili Kimchi
Not everything is here yet
But I'll quickly eat the pizza first
I have to eat it before it gets cold
Oh I'm so curious
It's delicious
I haven't tried a lot of margherita pizzas
It's closer to brazier pizza, not delivery pizza
It smells so good
(Huh? What is it?)

(The next pizza is here) Hello, this is Corn & Chorizo Pizza
It has sweet corn puree, chicken breast, chili, and chorizo ham
(Shakes are here too) Thank you
(Vanilla / Oreo) Usually, burgers and shakes go well together
Nom nom
Oh, the shakes are so good
It's not too sweet, it's just perfect
It's very smooth and tasty
(Dipping sauce is here!) I'll give you them
Please put them here
(Buttermilk & Spicy Tomato)
The margherita pizza
is very basic
but it's not greasy and it's light
And it smells very good
(Dipped in the buttermilk sauce)

(What is this?!)
Since it's a cream sauce,
I thought it would be too rich
but it's very refreshing
It's very new
Spicy Tomato sauce is
the tomato sauce on the pizza
but spicier
This is the Corn & Chorizo
(I don't like cilantro.. Haha) I took out the cilantro, there was cilantro in it
It smells very savory
It's delicious
(Yummy)
They all have a unique scent. It's kind of like a spice
It's not too strong, it's aromatic
This is delicious

So delicious
J.F.C Dirty Fries
(J.F.C chicken and mozzarella cheese on top of fries!) There's chicken on top
There are fries on the bottom
The chicken is so tender!
So tasty
(Spicier than it looks) The sauce is very spicy
(Cooling down with the shake) It's so spicy
(Even if I don't use chopsticks...)
Wow, I spilled it all
- This is more of the sides - Yes
Thank you
They're fries called Just Fries
This is the sauce for that
This is the Ham Hock & Pineapple
We baked 'ham hock' which is pork shank

and chili flakes in the oven
And it has pineapples on it as well
(Please give me the biggest one) Can you give me this one?
- Thank you - I'll place it here
- Enjoy - Thank you
This one just came out
(So hot) so it's very hot, the cheese is stretching too
This scent is unique as well
The texture feels like duck meat
(Come on, pineapple pizza lovers) Not everyone likes pineapple pizza
I like them
It's delicious
The pizza sauce is very refreshing
It's almost sour
(You've waited long, wings haha!) I should eat these now
First, the mildest one

Sweet Chili Kimchi!
Kimchi...?
Looks a bit scary
Oh! It smells good!
(A twist) It smells different to how it looks
(+ deboning skill)
(+ deboning skill)
The sauce is on the salty side
I can't taste kimchi
I have the homemade lemonade for you
Thank you
(The next spicy one) JFC wings
(I apologize haha) JFC, not KFC
The sauce is like chili sauce with cream sauce
(Best deboning skill)
(Meanwhile, the daily pizza is ready!)

I have the daily special pizza
Today's daily special pizza is the Fennel Sausage Pizza
What kind of meat is this?
- It's pork - Oh pork
For the pizza,
they keep bringing them
(Always filling up the empty plate!) like how they did at 'Texas de Brazil', I think it's really good
I can eat hot pizza right away
(I love it because it's bottomless hehe) And I can eat a lot because it's bottomless
This taste..?!
It's familiar
(Plane food...?) Plane food..? No
(It's familiar but can't explain...) This is really familiar, I feel like I had it before
(I'll eat it all before I explain..)
It reminds me of meatballs
(Another bite)

Wow, this tastes exotic too
(Sawadeeka..?) It's something you'd taste in Thailand
(Chocolatey barbecue) This is chocolate
I'm scared to eat it
(Chocolate wings...)
(Choco choco) It smells like chocolate
(What will it taste like?)
(Eating well..)
How can I describe this?
It has a sour and thick barbecue sauce
with dark chocolate scent
What is this..?
It's not bad. It's okay
but I don't think everyone will like it
(She doesn't seem to like it)
Street hot sauce

(Even the color is different. Spicy power...) The color is already hot
(Cheating)
(Ugh)
(Smells so spicy)
Whoa, the spiciness stabs my nose
(Scared of spicy food...)
(Picking up the courage and trying it)
Oh, the scent is very strong
(But it's okay to eat?)
(Nope)
(Do not let the enemy know about my death..) That's why I have to drink the shake....
(Let's give her some time...)
(Oh dear, she's not good with spicy food haha)
It's spicy
(Don't be weak, girl!)
(Already out of it)

I can't eat this
(Pizza that will calm down the spiciness!) I have the next special pizza, Ragu Pizza
It's made with pork, beef and chicken
We used ragu sauce
Thank you
I hope the spiciness goes away. Enjoy
Ragu, ragu is popular these days
(Her taste buds are not back to normal yet) I don't know if I can taste this properly because it's spicy
(Can't taste) I can't taste it because it's too spicy
He said it was ragu pizza
This also tastes exotic
It's like mashed meatballs
The pizzas...
(Fine to try it all) There are 6 types, and I think everyone can enjoy them all
because
the pizza is thin and is very light

so it's very easy to eat compared to regular pizza
Is that right..?
(It's just routine for her) I don't feel full even if I eat regular pizza
(Boldly trying the greens..) What's this?
This flavor is very unique
Greens
It's basil
(Our kid doesn't know her greens well..) Oh this is basil
They're not actually
open for business at this moment
I was invited until 5
What time is it?
(Overtime) It's over 5
I don't have a lot of time
(Putting more importance on being invited) I met Gordon Ramsay
It's a meaningful event

so I won't eat a lot today
This is the Tandoori Halloumi
There are pomegranate seeds on it
It's the most exotic pizza among all the pizzas
(Here you go) I'll place it here
Thank you
It's very unique
It's very exotic and I can taste a lot of spices
But if I can eat it,
most people can
(This voice...?!) Hello
Oh! Nice to meet you!
(Who is he?!) Can I go in?
Oh yes
(SanjeokTV Babgubnam!) It's our first time meeting
- You're eating a lot - No

(I think it's less than usual...?) Isn't it too simple?
(Hiding the size of her stomach today...) Today, it's kind of like an event so..
Oh event
Anyway, we should have a...
Oh I'd like that!
(What are you saying?) How dare I
- I always watch your videos - Really?
(Turn off the camera right now) Should I ask you something like that with the camera off?
I'm serious!
(It was nice to meet you even for a short time!) I'm just kidding. I won't disturb you while you're eating
(SanjeokTV Babgubnam, like, subscribe, comment) Thank you
This is like an event
(An event where many Korean YouTubers were invited!) so Babgubnam came and
Seungwoo Dad is here too
(Alone) Everyone left and I'm the last one here
I should head out soon too

I'll eat the last pizza
and get the rest packed up
(It's here) The last one
- This is the Pepperoni Pizza - Wow, looks delicious
I'll place it on your plate
This is the most popular pizza here
I was gonna get these packed
but they don't have any containers and they can't be packed
That's too bad but after this,
(PD is stunned) I'll quickly eat this with my PD
and head out
I'll review this pizza
(PD is in a rush..)
That's the chocolate one...!
- How is it? - Mmm!
(Really?) Is it good?

No haha
(Happy to have a comrade haha)
(Meanwhile) The pepperoni is good
So delicious
Pepperoni is the best
(Gordon Ramsay Pizza CLEAR!)
I'm done!
I think I'll have to stop here due to time
I'm so honored that I got to meet Gordon Ramsay
It's so cool, I still feel amazed
I can't believe it
I enjoyed eating today as well!
- Can we take a picture? - Yes
Thank you
